UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Stores user-specific information, including their role within the IntelliSecureX system.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity.

email.description: The user's email address, used for authentication and contact.

role.description: The access role of the user within the system (e.g., 'Admin', 'User').

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user profile was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user profile was last updated.

Document.title: Document
Document.description: Stores metadata about a document uploaded to the IntelliSecureX system. The actual document content is stored in Firebase Storage.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Document entity.

name.description: The original name of the uploaded document.

storagePath.description: The path or URI to the original document file in Firebase Storage.

ownerId.description: Reference to the UserProfile entity of the user who uploaded this document. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Document)

uploadedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the document was uploaded.

decoyGeneratedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the decoy version of the document was last generated or updated.

originalContentTextPath.description: Path to the extracted plain text content of the original document in Firebase Storage, used for NLP processing.

decoyContentTextPath.description: Path to the plain text content of the decoy document in Firebase Storage.

ActivityLog.title: ActivityLog
ActivityLog.description: Records significant user and system activities within the IntelliSecureX platform for monitoring and auditing purposes.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ActivityLog entry.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile entity of the user who performed the action, if applicable. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N ActivityLog)

actionType.description: The type of action performed (e.g., 'User authenticated', 'Document uploaded', 'Decoy activated', 'Unauthorized access attempt').

documentId.description: Reference to the Document entity involved in the action, if applicable. (Relationship: Document 1:N ActivityLog)

timestamp.description: Timestamp indicating when the action occurred.

status.description: The outcome or state of the action (e.g., 'success', 'failed', 'info', 'warning').

description.description: A more detailed textual description of the activity.

CallRecord.title: CallRecord
CallRecord.description: Represents a call record in the BPO Call Center System.

definition.description: Stores user-specific information, including their role (Admin/User).

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user.

definition.description: Records significant user and system activities.

params.name: logId
params.description: The unique identifier for an activity log entry.

definition.description: Stores metadata for documents uploaded by a specific user.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the document owner.

params.name: documentId
params.description: The unique identifier for the document entry.

definition.description: Stores call center records for the BPO module.

params.name: callId
params.description: The unique identifier for the call record.
